faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.sub: Everything you need to know before getting a quote.

items.q: What states are you licensed in?
items.a: We are licensed in CT, FL, GA, MA, MD, NC, NJ, OH, PA, SC, and TN — with Florida as our primary market.

items.q: How long does it take to get a quote?
items.a: Most quotes are ready within 1 business day. We contact you directly with personalized options.

items.q: Do you work with multiple insurance companies?
items.a: Yes. As an independent agency we work with multiple top-rated carriers to find you the best rate and coverage.

items.q: Can I bundle personal and commercial policies?
items.a: Absolutely. We can handle all your insurance needs — personal and commercial — in one place.

items.q: What is a Business Owner Policy (BOP)?
items.a: A BOP bundles general liability and commercial property insurance into one affordable policy, ideal for small businesses.

items.q: Is flood insurance required in Florida?
items.a: If your property is in a designated flood zone and you have a federally-backed mortgage, flood insurance is required. We make it easy to get covered.

meta.title: Home Replacement Cost Estimator | Ativa Insurance
meta.description: Find out how much coverage your home really needs. Free replacement cost calculator for CT, FL, GA, MA, MD, NC, NJ, OH, PA, SC, and TN homeowners.

hero.headline: What Would It Cost to Rebuild Your Home?
hero.sub: Most homeowners are underinsured by 20–40%. Our free calculator shows you the real number — in under 2 minutes.

warning.title: Market Value ≠ Insurance Value
warning.text: Your home's market price includes land — and land can't burn down. Insurance protects only the structure. Most people are insured for the wrong number.

cards.title: Condo (HO-6)
cards.text: Your HOA insures the building exterior. Your HO-6 covers only the interior — flooring, cabinets, appliances, your stuff. Coverage needs are much lower than a house.

cards.title: House / Townhouse
cards.text: A full rebuild means foundation to roof — materials, labor, debris removal. Florida's construction costs run higher than the national average. Don't underinsure.

items.q: What's the difference between replacement cost and market value?
items.a: Market value includes land and location premiums. Replacement cost is what it would cost to rebuild the structure — materials, labor, and debris removal. These numbers can differ by 30–50%.

items.q: Why do condo owners need less coverage than homeowners?
items.a: Condo HOAs typically insure the building exterior and common areas. Your HO-6 policy covers only the interior — walls, flooring, cabinets, and your belongings. This means you may need significantly less coverage.

Our estimates are based on current construction cost data per state and typical finish levels. They are accurate within 15–20% for planning purposes. For a precise figure, request a formal replacement cost appraisal.

items.q: My home has custom finishes. Will that affect the estimate?
items.a: Yes — select 'High-End / Custom' as your finish level. Our agents can also account for unique features like custom tile, smart home systems, or specialty roofing when preparing your quote.

items.q: Is this a real insurance quote?
items.a: No. This is a replacement cost estimate — the coverage amount you should carry. Your actual premium depends on many additional factors. An Ativa agent will follow up with a real quote.

cta.headline: Ready for a Real Quote?
cta.sub: Our agents shop multiple carriers to get you the best rate for your replacement cost.
